import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
  let seen: Map<String, Int> = {}
  mut i = 0
  mut count = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    if not seen.contains_key(tok)
      seen = {tok: 1}
      count = count + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print("unique=#{count}")
  Ok(())
end
